---
title: "EDA"
author: "Matthew Wilson"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r, echo=FALSE}


library(patchwork)
library(tidyverse)
mac <- vroom::vroom("ARMD.txt")
mac$Trt <- as.factor(mac$Trt)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}

# mac %>%
#   ggplot(aes(x = Vision, y = as.factor(Time), fill = as.factor(Trt)))+
#   geom_violin()

mac %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Vision,
             y = as.factor(Time),
             fill = as.factor(Trt))) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.8) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Vision by Time and Treatment",
    x = "Vision Score",
    y = "Time (Weeks)",
    fill = "Treatment"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# 
# mac %>%
#   ggplot(aes(x = Baseline-Vision, y = as.factor(Time), fill = as.factor(Trt)))+
#   geom_violin()

mac %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Baseline - Vision,
             y = as.factor(Time),
             fill = as.factor(Trt))) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.8) +
  labs(
    title = "Change in Vision from Baseline by Time",
    x = "Baseline − Vision (Change Score)",
    y = "Time (Weeks)",
    fill = "Treatment"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# mac %>%
#   filter(Time == 52)%>%
#   ggplot(aes(x = Vision, fill = as.factor(Trt)))+
#   geom_histogram()

mac %>%
  filter(Time == 52) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Vision, fill = as.factor(Trt))) +
  geom_histogram(
    bins = 20,
    alpha = 0.7,
    position = "identity"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Vision Distribution at Week 52",
    x = "Vision Score",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Treatment"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# mac %>%
#   ggplot(aes(x = Time, y = Vision, color = as.factor(Trt)))+
#   geom_point()

mac %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Time,
             y = Vision,
             color = as.factor(Trt))) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
  labs(
    title = "Vision Over Time by Treatment",
    x = "Time (Weeks)",
    y = "Vision Score",
    color = "Treatment"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}

treat_means <- mac %>%
  group_by(Time, Trt)%>%
  summarise(mean_vis = mean(Vision))
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
treat_means %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=mean_vis, x = Time, color = Trt))+
  geom_line()
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}

ind_lm <- lm(Vision ~ Time + Trt + Baseline, data = mac)

cor(matrix(residuals(ind_lm),ncol = 4, byrow = T))
```
